text_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

query_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

trace_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

part_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

asynchronous_metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

query_metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

latency_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

error_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

processors_profile_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

query_views_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

query_thread_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1

asynchronous_insert_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY (event_date) ORDER BY (event_time) TTL event_date + INTERVAL 3 DAY DELETE SETTINGS ttl_only_drop_parts=1
